_storage: armor -> array slot +0x36A684; every other blessing/level -> one scattered bit in the bitfield at +0x36BC80 (g_flags 0xD9).
_status: flip-order mapping proved UNRELIABLE (buy order desynced by mid-sequence leveling). Only clear-tested bits are trusted; the rest carry stable 'slot N' labels until verified (e.g. during the mod build, via the clear-a-bit/see-which-un-Dones trick).
